'''Qualung Tulla''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] who worked for [[Meeko Ghintee]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he wanted by the [[Toydarian/Legends|Toydarian]] [[Rozatta]] for stealing her [[Fuel cell/Legends|fuel cell]] shipments. His [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]], worth 3,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] alive and 1,500 dead, was claimed by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]]-turned [[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
